title: Encanto
summary: I have a passion for print. There is nothing more rewarding than creating something by hand and making a special moment for someone else. From foil stamping to letterpress, I love learning new printing techniques. So in 2019 I decided to start my own business and create the worlds first magical paper company.
overview:
The brand was created to create a fantasy escape for our customers at every interaction. We are more than just a paper show, but a source for magic in the midst of all the adult stressors.

### 25K+ Followers

I focus my efforts on social media marketing. I utilize Facebook Business, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, Pinterest, and YouTube to create a marketing funnel. I quickly grew my accounts to over 20K followers, by taking advantage of trending topics to get over 2.7M views in some cases.

### Trade shows

I design and host trade show booths to meet our customers and network with other vendors. I’ve developed my strengths in marketing strategies through trial and error.
